column4: Created by Erwin Coumans, who received a Scientific and Technical Academy Award in 2015 for Bullet Physics. Actively used by Google Robotics for quadruped locomotion, sim-to-real transfer, motion imitation, and reinforcement learning. Can run in web browsers via Google Colab.
